sentences.arabic: تَتَنَاوَلُ أَعْمَالُ الرَّوَائِيَّةِ اللُّبْنَانِيَّةِ حَنَانَ الشَّيْخِ بِجَرَاءَةٍ مَوَاضِيعَ الْحَرْبِ وَالنِّسَاءِ وَالتَّمَرُّدِ فِي سِيَاقِ مُجْتَمَعَاتٍ عَرَبِيَّةٍ مُحَافِظَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Romani libanonske spisateljice Hanan al-Sheikh hrabro obrađuju teme rata, žena i pobune u kontekstu konzervativnih arapskih društava.
sentences.translationEn: The works of Lebanese novelist Hanan al-Shaykh boldly address themes of war, women and rebellion in the context of conservative Arab societies.
